dps.subtitle.zh-CN: 实时监测战斗数据和DPS统计
dps.subtitle.en: Monitor combat data and DPS statistics in real time

dps.selectTabPrompt.zh-CN: 请选择上方的选项卡查看详细设置
dps.selectTabPrompt.en: Please select a tab above to view detailed settings

debug.openLogDir.zh-CN: 打开应用日志所在文件夹
debug.openLogDir.en: Open the folder containing the application logs

debug.bundleDescription.zh-CN: 生成包含最近日志的 ZIP，便于支持与排查
debug.bundleDescription.en: Generate a ZIP containing recent logs for support and troubleshooting

debug.languageDescription.zh-CN: 选择翻译语言。缺失时回退到 zh-CN。
debug.languageDescription.en: Choose the translation language. Missing entries fall back to zh-CN.

debug.skillIdDisplayDescription.zh-CN: 控制技能表中的 ID 显示方式。
debug.skillIdDisplayDescription.en: Control how IDs are shown in skill tables.

dps.live.showYourNameDescription.zh-CN: “显示你的职业”会用职业替代你的名称；“名称 - 职业/专精”会同时显示两者。
dps.live.showYourNameDescription.en: "Show Your Class" replaces your name with your class; "Name - Class/Spec" shows both.

dps.live.showOthersNameDescription.zh-CN: “显示他人职业”会用职业替代他人名称；“名称 - 职业/专精”会同时显示两者。
dps.live.showOthersNameDescription.en: "Show Others' Class" replaces others' names with their class; "Name - Class/Spec" shows both.

dps.live.showYourName.option.nameClass.zh-CN: 显示你的名称 - 职业

dps.live.showYourName.option.nameSpec.zh-CN: 显示你的名称 - 专精

dps.live.showOthersName.option.nameClass.zh-CN: 显示他人名称 - 职业

dps.live.showOthersName.option.nameSpec.zh-CN: 显示他人名称 - 专精

dps.live.relativeToTopDPSPlayer.zh-CN: 以最高 DPS 为基准（玩家）

dps.live.relativeToTopDPSPlayerDescripti.zh-CN: 颜色条按最高 DPS 玩家进行相对缩放，而不是按所有玩家。适用于 20 人或世界 Boss。
dps.live.relativeToTopDPSPlayerDescripti.en: Scale color bars relative to the top DPS player instead of all players. Useful for 20-player groups or world bosses.

dps.live.relativeToTopDPSSkill.zh-CN: 以最高 DPS 为基准（技能）

dps.live.relativeToTopDPSSkillDescriptio.zh-CN: 颜色条按最高 DPS 技能进行相对缩放，而不是按所有技能。适用于 20 人或世界 Boss。
dps.live.relativeToTopDPSSkillDescriptio.en: Scale color bars relative to the top DPS skill instead of all skills. Useful for 20-player groups or world bosses.

dps.live.relativeToTopHealPlayer.zh-CN: 以最高治疗为基准（玩家）

dps.live.relativeToTopHealPlayerDescript.zh-CN: 颜色条按最高治疗玩家进行相对缩放，而不是按所有玩家。适用于 20 人或世界 Boss。
dps.live.relativeToTopHealPlayerDescript.en: Scale color bars relative to the top heal player instead of all players. Useful for 20-player groups or world bosses.

dps.live.relativeToTopHealSkill.zh-CN: 以最高治疗为基准（技能）

dps.live.relativeToTopHealSkillDescripti.zh-CN: 颜色条按最高治疗技能进行相对缩放，而不是按所有技能。适用于 20 人或世界 Boss。
dps.live.relativeToTopHealSkillDescripti.en: Scale color bars relative to the top heal skill instead of all skills. Useful for 20-player groups or world bosses.

dps.live.relativeToTopTankedPlayer.zh-CN: 以最高承伤为基准（玩家）

dps.live.relativeToTopTankedPlayerDescri.zh-CN: 颜色条按最高承伤玩家进行相对缩放，而不是按所有玩家。适用于 20 人或世界 Boss。
dps.live.relativeToTopTankedPlayerDescri.en: Scale color bars relative to the top tanked player instead of all players. Useful for 20-player groups or world bosses.

dps.live.relativeToTopTankedSkill.zh-CN: 以最高承伤为基准（技能）

dps.live.relativeToTopTankedSkillDescrip.zh-CN: 颜色条按最高承伤技能进行相对缩放，而不是按所有技能。适用于 20 人或世界 Boss。
dps.live.relativeToTopTankedSkillDescrip.en: Scale color bars relative to the top tanked skill instead of all skills. Useful for 20-player groups or world bosses.

dps.live.shortenTpsDescription.zh-CN: 将 TPS 显示为 5k、50k 等

dps.live.shortenAbilityScoreDescription.zh-CN: 将能力评分显示为缩写形式
dps.live.shortenAbilityScoreDescription.en: Display ability score in abbreviated form

dps.live.shortenDpsDescription.zh-CN: 将 DPS 显示为 5k、50k 等

dps.live.abbreviatedDecimalPlacesDescrip.zh-CN: 设置玩家表与技能明细中的 DPS/HPS/TPS 等缩写数值保留的小数位数
dps.live.abbreviatedDecimalPlacesDescrip.en: Set how many decimal places abbreviated DPS/HPS/TPS values keep in player and skill tables

dps.live.refreshRateDescription.zh-CN: 实时统计刷新间隔（50-2000ms）。越低越流畅，但更耗 CPU。
dps.live.refreshRateDescription.en: Refresh interval for live statistics (50–2000ms). Lower is smoother, but uses more CPU.

dps.live.defaultTargetDummyDescription.zh-CN: 头部打桩按钮会直接使用这里的默认目标
dps.live.defaultTargetDummyDescription.en: The header target-dummy button will use this default target directly

dps.live.showHeaderTargetDummyButtonDesc.zh-CN: 在实时窗口头部显示“打桩模式”开关和状态提示。
dps.live.showHeaderTargetDummyButtonDesc.en: Show the Target Dummy Mode toggle and status in the live window header.

dps.live.reorderColumnsHint.zh-CN: 使用箭头调整顺序；用开关控制显示/隐藏。
dps.live.reorderColumnsHint.en: Use the arrows to reorder; use the switches to show or hide columns.

dps.columns.historyPlayers.totalDmg.desc.zh-CN: 显示玩家造成的总伤害
dps.columns.historyPlayers.totalDmg.desc.en: Show the total damage dealt by the player

dps.columns.historyPlayers.dps.descripti.zh-CN: 显示玩家每秒造成的伤害 (DPS)
dps.columns.historyPlayers.dps.descripti.en: Show the player's damage per second (DPS)

dps.columns.historyPlayers.tdps.descript.zh-CN: 显示玩家的真实 DPS（基于全局活跃战斗时间）
dps.columns.historyPlayers.tdps.descript.en: Show the player's true DPS based on global active combat time

dps.columns.historyPlayers.bossDmg.descr.zh-CN: 显示玩家对首领造成的伤害
dps.columns.historyPlayers.bossDmg.descr.en: Show the damage dealt by the player to the boss

dps.columns.historyPlayers.bossDps.descr.zh-CN: 显示玩家对首领的秒伤 (Boss DPS)
dps.columns.historyPlayers.bossDps.descr.en: Show the player's DPS against the boss

dps.columns.historyPlayers.critRate.desc.en: Show the player's critical hit rate

dps.columns.historyPlayers.critDmgRate.d.zh-CN: 显示玩家造成的暴击伤害比例
dps.columns.historyPlayers.critDmgRate.d.en: Show the proportion of damage dealt as critical damage

dps.columns.historyPlayers.luckyRate.des.zh-CN: 显示玩家的幸运一击率
dps.columns.historyPlayers.luckyRate.des.en: Show the player's lucky hit rate

dps.columns.historyPlayers.luckyDmgRate..zh-CN: 显示玩家造成的幸运一击伤害比例
dps.columns.historyPlayers.luckyDmgRate..en: Show the proportion of damage dealt as lucky-hit damage

dps.columns.historyPlayers.hits.descript.zh-CN: 显示玩家的总命中次数
dps.columns.historyPlayers.hits.descript.en: Show the player's total number of hits

dps.columns.historyPlayers.hitsPerMinute.zh-CN: 显示玩家每分钟的命中次数
dps.columns.historyPlayers.hitsPerMinute.en: Show the player's hits per minute

dps.columns.historySkills.totalDmg.descr.zh-CN: 显示技能造成的总伤害
dps.columns.historySkills.totalDmg.descr.en: Show the total damage dealt by the skill

dps.columns.historySkills.dps.descriptio.en: Show the skill's damage per second (DPS)

dps.columns.historySkills.critRate.descr.en: Show the skill's critical hit rate

dps.columns.historySkills.critDmgRate.de.zh-CN: 显示技能造成的暴击伤害比例
dps.columns.historySkills.critDmgRate.de.en: Show the proportion of damage dealt as critical damage

dps.columns.historySkills.luckyRate.desc.zh-CN: 显示技能的幸运一击率
dps.columns.historySkills.luckyRate.desc.en: Show the skill's lucky hit rate

dps.columns.historySkills.luckyDmgRate.d.zh-CN: 显示技能造成的幸运一击伤害比例
dps.columns.historySkills.luckyDmgRate.d.en: Show the proportion of damage dealt as lucky-hit damage

dps.columns.historySkills.hits.descripti.zh-CN: 显示技能的总命中次数
dps.columns.historySkills.hits.descripti.en: Show the skill's total number of hits

dps.columns.historySkills.hitsPerMinute..zh-CN: 显示技能每分钟的命中次数
dps.columns.historySkills.hitsPerMinute..en: Show the skill's hits per minute

dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.healDealt.zh-CN: 显示玩家造成的总治疗量
dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.healDealt.en: Show the total healing done by the player

dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.hps.descr.zh-CN: 显示玩家每秒造成的治疗量 (HPS)
dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.hps.descr.en: Show the player's healing per second (HPS)

dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.critHealR.zh-CN: 显示玩家的治疗暴击率
dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.critHealR.en: Show the player's healing critical hit rate

dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.critDmgRa.zh-CN: 显示玩家造成的暴击治疗比例
dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.critDmgRa.en: Show the proportion of healing done as critical healing

dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.luckyRate.zh-CN: 显示玩家的幸运一击率
dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.luckyRate.en: Show the player's lucky hit rate

dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.luckyDmgR.zh-CN: 显示玩家造成的幸运一击治疗比例
dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.luckyDmgR.en: Show the proportion of healing done as lucky-hit healing

dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.hitsHeal..zh-CN: 显示玩家的总治疗次数
dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.hitsHeal..en: Show the player's total number of healing events

dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.hitsPerMi.zh-CN: 显示玩家每分钟的治疗次数
dps.columns.historyHealPlayers.hitsPerMi.en: Show the player's healing events per minute

dps.columns.historyHealSkills.totalDmg.d.zh-CN: 显示技能造成的总治疗量
dps.columns.historyHealSkills.totalDmg.d.en: Show the total healing done by the skill

dps.columns.historyHealSkills.dps.descri.en: Show the skill's healing per second (HPS)

dps.columns.historyHealSkills.critRate.d.en: Show the skill's critical hit rate

dps.columns.historyHealSkills.critDmgRat.en: Show the proportion of healing done as critical healing

dps.columns.historyHealSkills.luckyRate..zh-CN: 显示技能的幸运一击率
dps.columns.historyHealSkills.luckyRate..en: Show the skill's lucky hit rate

dps.columns.historyHealSkills.luckyDmgRa.en: Show the proportion of healing done as lucky-hit healing

dps.columns.historyHealSkills.hits.descr.zh-CN: 显示技能的总治疗次数
dps.columns.historyHealSkills.hits.descr.en: Show the skill's total number of healing events

dps.columns.historyHealSkills.hitsPerMin.en: Show the skill's healing events per minute

dps.columns.historyTankedPlayers.damageT.zh-CN: 显示玩家承受的总伤害
dps.columns.historyTankedPlayers.damageT.en: Show the total damage taken by the player

dps.columns.historyTankedPlayers.tankedP.en: Show the player's damage taken per second (DTPS)

dps.columns.historyTankedPlayers.critTak.zh-CN: 显示玩家被暴击的几率
dps.columns.historyTankedPlayers.critTak.en: Show the player's chance to be critically hit

dps.columns.historyTankedPlayers.hitsPer.en: Show the player's hits taken per minute

dps.columns.historyTankedSkills.dps.desc.en: Show the skill's damage taken per second (DTPS)

dps.columns.historyTankedSkills.critRate.en: Show the chance for this skill to be critically hit

dps.columns.liveHealPlayers.hits.descrip.en: Show the player's total healing count

dps.columns.liveHealPlayers.hitsPerMinut.en: Show the player's healing count per minute

dps.columns.liveTankedPlayers.totalDmg.d.en: Show the total damage taken by the player

dps.columns.liveTankedPlayers.dps.descri.zh-CN: 显示玩家每秒承受的伤害 (TPS)
dps.columns.liveTankedPlayers.dps.descri.en: Show the player's damage taken per second (TPS)

dps.columns.liveTankedPlayers.critRate.d.en: Show the player's chance to be critically hit

dps.columns.liveTankedSkills.dps.descrip.zh-CN: 显示技能每秒造成的承伤 (DTPS)

dps.network.captureMethodDescription.zh-CN: 选择用于捕获网络数据包的方法（需要重启应用）。
dps.network.captureMethodDescription.en: Choose the method used to capture network packets. (Requires app restart.)

dps.network.networkDeviceDescription.zh-CN: 选择用于捕获流量的网卡。
dps.network.networkDeviceDescription.en: Choose the network adapter used to capture traffic.

dps.network.npcapMissingSuffix.zh-CN: 请安装 Npcap 后再使用该方式。
dps.network.npcapMissingSuffix.en: Please install Npcap before using this method.

dps.shortcuts.toggleBossHp.zh-CN: 切换 Boss 血量显示

themes.general.customFontsDescription.zh-CN: 导入自定义字体以替换默认字体。字体文件格式应为 .woff2, .woff, .ttf, 或 .otf。
themes.general.customFontsDescription.en: Import custom fonts to replace the defaults. Supported font formats are .woff2, .woff, .ttf, and .otf.

themes.general.enableCustomSans.zh-CN: 启用自定义无衬线字体

themes.general.enableCustomSansDescripti.zh-CN: UI 文本使用自定义字体
themes.general.enableCustomSansDescripti.en: Use the custom font for UI text.

themes.general.enableCustomMonoDescripti.zh-CN: 数字/代码使用自定义等宽字体
themes.general.enableCustomMonoDescripti.en: Use the custom font for numbers and code.

themes.general.showSkillTableHeaderDescr.zh-CN: 切换技能表列标题显示/隐藏
themes.general.showSkillTableHeaderDescr.en: Show or hide the skill table column headers.

themes.general.customColorThemeDescripti.zh-CN: 自定义每个颜色变量（支持设置透明度）
themes.general.customColorThemeDescripti.en: Customize each color variable, including transparency.

themes.general.classSpecIntro.zh-CN: 自定义职业或专精的颜色。选择“专精颜色”可在检测到专精时显示特定颜色。
themes.general.classSpecIntro.en: Customize class or spec colors. Choose "Spec Colors" to show a specific color when a spec is detected.

themes.general.classColorsDescription.zh-CN: 自定义实时统计中各职业的颜色。
themes.general.classColorsDescription.en: Customize the colors used for each class in the live meter.

themes.general.specColorsDescription.en: Customize the colors used for each spec.

themes.general.backgroundImageDescriptio.zh-CN: 为所有窗口使用自定义背景图片。注意：需要将背景颜色设置为半透明，图片才能显示出来。
themes.general.backgroundImageDescriptio.en: Use a custom background image for all windows. Note: the background color must be semi-transparent for the image to show.

themes.general.enableBackgroundImageDesc.en: Use an image as the background.

themes.general.imageModeDescription.en: How the image should fit the window.
